title: Jarvis confirmation-first action safety
text: Jarvis converts natural-language requests into structured action frames. Operations that mutate user data, such as calendar edits, itinerary saves, compound schedule drafts, and cost creation, are confirmation-gated before execution.

title: RAG workflow foundation
text: The RAG prototype decomposes documents into retrievable units, matches user queries against relevant passages, assembles context, and generates an evidence-grounded answer from the retrieved information.

title: AI full-stack super individual
text: The project narrative demonstrates how one developer can use AI coding tools to move from requirements, architecture, backend, frontend, testing, documentation, and demo delivery to an end-to-end application package.
